name: ExtendedUTxO
description_short: A free, interactive guide to Cardano's Extended UTxO model. Learn by building transactions in a live ledger simulator, no wallet or signup required.
description_long:
ExtendedUTxO.com is a free, interactive learning platform for Cardano's Extended UTxO (eUTxO) ledger model. Instead of reading theory, learners build transactions and watch how they settle in a live ledger simulator, entirely in the browser with no wallet, no signup and no on-chain cost.

An eight-chapter curriculum takes about 75 minutes and progresses from UTxO fundamentals through coin selection, the mempool, script validation and DeFi patterns, up to a capstone in which the learner constructs a real eUTxO transaction. A `/live` view streams the current chain tip and recent blocks so the abstract model is grounded in what is actually happening on Cardano right now.

products.name: ExtendedUTxO
products.description: Interactive, browser-based course and live ledger simulator for learning Cardano's eUTxO model.
